name: Applesauce Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the yeast, bread flour, wheat flour, salt, sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
3. Add the warm applesauce, butter, warm apple juice, and grated fresh apple to the dry ingredients. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated.
4. If using a bread machine, add the mixture in the order listed into the pan. Select white bread setting and start the machine.
5. After the first kneading cycle, remove the dough from the machine and divide it into two equal portions.
6. Place each portion into separate small loaf pans and cover with plastic wrap or a damp towel.
7. Let the dough rise until doubled in size, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and sound when tapped on the bottom.
